whyCards.title: 1. Gather the facts first
whyCards.desc: The complaint, photos, lab results and history are saved into one case.
items: what data to show the doctor.
whyCards.footer: The result is a prepared case for a doctor or AI review.

whyCards.title: 2. A clear next step
whyCards.desc: The service separates urgent signs from planned questions and shows action options.
whyCards.footer: No diagnosis promises and no generic advice.

whyCards.title: 3. History is not lost between visits
whyCards.desc: The medical archive stores consultations, lab results and documents in a timeline.
items: repeat visits are easier to prepare,

landing.capabilitiesTitle: What you can do in Takhet+

capConsultation.title: Online doctor consultations
capConsultation.desc: Video, audio or chat with a doctor. The patient chooses the format, and the specialist receives a prepared case.

capSecondary.title: Route to the right specialist
capSecondary.desc: Based on complaints and documents, the service helps decide where to start: therapist, specialist, psychologist or planned review.

capSecondary.title: Second opinion from doctors (Swarm Medicine)
capSecondary.desc: For a complex case, you can request an anonymous review by several specialists. The decision remains with the doctor and patient.

landing.archiveTitle: Medical archive: documents, lab results, consultations
landing.archiveDesc: Visits, prescriptions, lab results and files are kept in one place. Access belongs only to the patient and people they authorize.

logistics.title: Medicine delivery
logistics.desc: The service is temporarily paused due to logistics issues and operational rebuilding.

logistics.title: Doctor home visit
logistics.desc: The service is temporarily paused due to logistics and route planning issues.

logistics.title: Mental support
logistics.desc: Specialist consultations and calm AI dialogue for anxiety, stress and overload.

logistics.title: Veterinary consultations
logistics.desc: Online booking with a specialist for a pet when quick situation review is needed.

landing.controlSubtitle: Takhet+ is useful when you need to:
controlItems: send full context to a doctor.
landing.philosophy: Takhet+ connects search, consultations, archive and AI review into one workflow. AI helps prepare questions and documents; medical decisions are made by a doctor.

faqItems.q: What is this service and how is it different from regular clinics?
faqItems.a:
Takhet+ is one platform where you can quickly understand your condition,
get guidance and, if needed, move directly to a doctor.

Instead of ?book first ? understand later?,
you understand the situation first and then decide what to do.

faqItems.q: Is it reliable if I do not know who is behind it?
faqItems.a:
The platform is built around real clinical expertise and practicing specialists.

You are not dealing with random people ?
doctors are verified and work within the system.

faqItems.q: Do I have to pay and see a doctor right away?
faqItems.a:
No.

You can start for free: understand your condition,
assess the level of the problem and then decide
whether a consultation is needed.

faqItems.q: How accurate and useful is it?
faqItems.a:
The service helps structure your condition and reduce uncertainty.

It does not replace a doctor, but it gives you:
? an understanding of what is happening
? possible risks
? what to do next

For many people, this is already enough to stop delaying care.

faqItems.q: What is the real benefit for me?
faqItems.a:
You save time, money and stress.

Instead of chaotic searching and waiting:
? you understand the situation quickly
? you avoid going to the wrong specialist
? you act sooner

Most importantly, you are not left alone with the problem.
